CustomField.description: Evaluates SaaS and Billing Onboarding Funnel Stages on the school object that the Combined Funnel Account is related to.
CustomField.formula: IF( AND( ISBLANK(Account__r.School_Object__r.SaaS_Activation_Date_2024__c), ISBLANK(Account__r.School_Object__r.Billing_Activation_Date_2024__c) ), "Onboarding", IF( AND( NOT(ISBLANK(Account__r.School_Object__r.SaaS_Activation_Date_2024__c)), ISBLANK(Account__r.School_Object__r.Billing_Activation_Date_2024__c) ), "SaaS Only Activated", IF( AND( ISBLANK(Account__r.School_Object__r.SaaS_Activation_Date_2024__c), NOT(ISBLANK(Account__r.School_Object__r.Billing_Activation_Date_2024__c)) ), "Billing Only Activated", IF( AND( NOT(ISBLANK(Account__r.School_Object__r.SaaS_Activation_Date_2024__c)), NOT(ISBLANK(Account__r.School_Object__r.Billing_Activation_Date_2024__c)) ), "SaaS and Billing Activated", "" ) ) ) )
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Shows whether the center is SaaS and Billing Activated, SaaS Only Activated, Billing Only Activated, Onboarding, or Unknown.
CustomField.label: Combined Activation Status
